", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled it and prepared a summary for Dr. Martinez.

- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min

Clinical notes:

- CU-002: responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: new enrollment; first dose was 2026-03-27

On PK stability:
- From the dosing config alone, everything looks internally consistent.
- I don’t see any obvious dosing or clearance mismatches in the current entries.
- CU-001 and CU-002 look stable/improving from the notes.
- CU-003 is newer, so routine close monitoring still makes sense.

I’ve saved the full summary as a report. If you want, send me Dr. Martinez’s email and I can format it into a ready-to-send note.
